purpose: Own the WebGPU visible-line culling lifecycle for indirect line drawing.
invariants: Compute binding names and locations mirror CLEAR_VISIBLE_LINE_BINDINGS and CULL_VISIBLE_LINE_BINDINGS.
Caller-owned line attribute buffers stay outside this pass.
prepare() returns true only after clear and cull compute passes run for the current frame.
draw() uses the prepared indirect buffer and does not allocate per frame.
change_protocols: Changing cull uniforms requires checking cull-visible-lines.compute.wgsl.ts and contracts.ts together.
Changing indirect draw behavior requires checking luma model access shims in shared/contracts.ts.
